local_updates: Bricktown Blues & BBQ Festival runs June 26–27 with live blues bands, BBQ, free entry, and outdoor activity along the canal.
The Alley Club hosts its Annual Beach Party on June 27 with Rock Candy, DJ Aundrea Meyer, and Christy Bryant & Twist of Fate.
Brickhouse Saloon hosts Mixtape Revival on June 27 with doors at 8 PM and show at 9 PM.
The Ritz of Shawnee hosts Temple202 with special guest Jukebox Hero on June 27 at 8 PM.
Friends of Friends has music Wednesday through Saturday, including Jukebox Hero on Friday and Weekend Allstars on Saturday.
Okie State Room has a full week of local music and entertainment, including Blacktop Bloodline Friday and Austin Dixon Saturday.
Libby's Cafe in Goldsby hosts Heather & Chris on Saturday, June 27 from 10 PM–12 AM.
Mooney's remains a standing weekly relationship venue while open.
weather_watch: Late June — Hot evenings and possible scattered storms may affect outdoor events, patios, and weekend plans
